action_envelope.approval_gates: human ratification is required before changing objective metrics, anti-goal thresholds, or promoting release work
action_envelope.human_ratification_boundary: Reject any attempted frame, guardrail, metric, threshold, or action-envelope change unless the human ratifies it.

human_approval.note: Frame is a write-once mirror of the ratified working-frame markdown. The loop may not edit it; only the human re-ratifies.

anti_goal.*.missing_data_policy: breaking flag pauses committing moves; cannot/pointless stop the branch
anti_goal.*.read_method: typecheck, vitest, pnpm lint, git diff --check, second-agent review
anti_goal.*.source_of_truth: local command output, changed-path inspection, verifier/browser/lint tests, independent Claude/Codex review

objective.unchecked_path_or_binding_coun.max_age: stale immediately after touching contract/catalog surfaces
objective.unchecked_path_or_binding_coun.missing_data_policy: package promotion blocked while package gate unproven
objective.unchecked_path_or_binding_coun.source_of_truth: typed path/action binders + verifier rejection tests + tsc

objective.validated_spec_cases_passed.max_age: 7 days or stale immediately after touching contract/renderer/lint surfaces
objective.validated_spec_cases_passed.missing_data_policy: do not dispatch package-extraction work on stale or missing reads unless human waives
objective.validated_spec_cases_passed.read_method: pnpm -F @pumped-fn/lite-react-practical exec vitest run research/typed-render-contract/contract.test.ts and --project browser view.browser.test.tsx

non_negotiable_tripwires: A promoted spec case has an unchecked state path, prop binding, event field, slot, component, or flow payload.
React rendering is not proven for a promoted case.
Durable state mutation or async/domain work bypasses Lite flows/resources/scoped values.
A spec contains branching business workflow rather than declared wiring to Lite actions.
A renderer creates scopes, verifies specs, or starts render work at import time.
React hook dependency correctness relies only on review.
A DKR checkpoint, CKR, PKR, or package-promotion decision is accepted from one LLM narrative without deterministic evidence and independent review.

objective.loop_ownership: The orchestrator owns objective checks, check-ins, the OKR board, and subagent steering until the objective metric reaches target: validated_spec_cases_passed >= 4 with unchecked_path_or_binding_count == 0, or a human/blocking flag stops the loop.

metrics.baseline: 0 for DKR1 slice; package gate unproven

spec_cases_required: event or watch-triggered Lite flow action
objective.statement: Promote the strict spec/catalog renderer from DKR to package work only when it proves designer-owned JSON iteration without losing pumped-fn's type, DI, laziness, and testability value.
